{{CargoRelic
|name=Pigeon Specimen
|class_id=20157
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This specimen was made from the dead body of the last passenger pigeon in the world. In the past, billions of passenger pigeons lived a carefree life on the American continent. However, due to over-hunting, this beautiful creature went extinct within just a hundred years, reminding people of the sin they committed in the past.
|fame=19
|art=30
|fth=15
|civ=12
|tech=14
|ss1=Exploration Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Exploration Eggs hatched, Snail HP +10<br>400/400 Exploration Eggs hatched
|ss2=Exploration Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Exploration Eggs hatched, Snail HP +20<br>400/400 Exploration Eggs hatched
|ss3=Exploration Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Exploration Eggs hatched, Snail HP +30<br>400/400 Exploration Eggs hatched
|ss4=Exploration Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Exploration Eggs hatched, Snail HP +30<br>400/400 Exploration Eggs hatched
|ss7=Exploration Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Exploration Eggs hatched, Snail HP +30<br>400/400 Exploration Eggs hatched<br> (Awakened)
}}
